rule_metadata.name: Hak5_BashBunny
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'Hak5 BashBunny' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule Hak5_BashBunny
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'Hak5 BashBunny' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "Hak5 BashBunny"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /_USBSTOR\#Disk\&Ven_\&Prod_\&Rev_0000.{0,1000}53f56307\-b6bf\-11d0\-94f2\-00a0c91efb8b/

	condition:
		any of them
}
